    A

    add(String) - Method in class dao.controllers.GenreDAO
    This method adds a new genre to the database.

    This method adds a new author to the database.

    This method adds a new loan to the database.
    add(Livre) - Method in class dao.controllers.LivreDAO
    This method adds a new book to the database.
    addLabeledField(String, JComponent) - Method in class ui.gui.forms.DynamicFormPanel
    Adds a labeled field to the form panel.

    Adds a labeled field to the form panel with a specific fill constraint.
    addLabeledField(String, JDateComponent) - Method in class ui.gui.forms.DynamicFormPanel
    Adds a labeled field to the form panel with a specific fill constraint.
    addSpanningComponent(JComponent, int, int) - Method in class ui.gui.forms.DynamicFormPanel
    Adds a component that spans the entire width of the form panel.
    Auteur - Class in models
    This class represents an author in the database It contains the author's ID, last name, and first name.
    Auteur(int, String, String) - Constructor for class models.Auteur
    Constructor to create an Auteur object with the specified ID, last name, and first name.
    AuteurAddForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.auteur
    This class represents a form for adding a new author.
    AuteurAddForm() - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.auteur.AuteurAddForm
    Constructor for the AuteurAddForm.
    AuteurDAO - Class in dao.controllers
    This class is used to manage authors in the database.
    AuteurDAO() - Constructor for class dao.controllers.AuteurDAO
    Constructor for AuteurDAO.
    AuteurDeleteForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.auteur
    This class represents a form for confirming the deletion of an author.
    AuteurDeleteForm(Auteur) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.auteur.AuteurDeleteForm
    Constructs a new AuteurDeleteForm with the specified author to delete.
    AuteurForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.auteur
    Abstract class representing a form for managing authors.
    AuteurForm(String, String) - Constructor for class ui.gui.forms.auteur.AuteurForm
    Constructor for the AuteurForm class.
    AuteurGUI - Class in ui.gui
    This class represents the GUI for managing authors.

    Constructor for the AuteurGUI.
    AuteurModifyForm - Class in ui.gui.forms.auteur
    This class represents a form for modifying an existing author.
